_meta.notes: Hiring-meeting holdout. Tests propose_takes ability to extract genuinely-uncertain claims (conviction near 0.5) where many extractors drop the signal entirely.

claims.claim_text: charlie-example hasn't operated at the velocity acme-example needs
Founders adopt operating cadence of previous company more than they think
charlie-example doesn't survive 12 months in COO role at acme-example
alice-example hires charlie-example despite the concern raised
First 90 days look strong before velocity gap shows up around month 4
